response.overview: Amais, a young man who constantly haunts himself by replaying old memories in his head of himself and his ex-girlfriend, Carie Winx. His obsessive daydreaming begins to change from a memory to a video archive. Diving into Amais's mind, will he be able to look within himself to learn to move on, or continue the endless admiration addiction of the past?
response.title: Why Are We Here?
